headlines.headline: Varvov Retail Group to host investor day focused on supply chain optimization strategy

sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected decline in revenue in a specific region indicates weakening performance and will negatively impact overall revenue expectations.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
